user_story: As an HR admin, I want to scope a manual attendance entry by applicable locations, departments and positions, so that I can target the correct set of employees
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Manual Attendance Sheet screen; When I choose applicable locations, departments and positions; Then the employee selection is scoped to those criteria

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select one or more employees using the transfer controls, so that I can record attendance for multiple people at once
acceptance_criteria: Given applicable filters are set; When I move employees using the >>, >, < and << controls; Then the selected employees are added to the attendance entry

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the attendance date, so that the manual entry is recorded against the correct day
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Manual Attendance Sheet screen; When I pick an attendance date from the calendar; Then the entry is dated accordingly

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add in time and out time rows with comments, so that I can capture the exact punches for an employee
acceptance_criteria: Given the attendance date and employees are set; When I click Add new time and enter in time, out time, in time comments and out time comments; Then a punch row is added to the grid

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to submit the manual attendance sheet, so that the recorded attendance is saved to the system
acceptance_criteria: Given I have entered attendance details; When I click Submit; Then the manual attendance is saved for the selected employees and date

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel the manual attendance entry, so that I can discard changes without saving
acceptance_criteria: Given I have started a manual attendance entry; When I click Cancel; Then the entry is discarded and no attendance is recorded
